ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the esports team */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region in which the team competes */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Calculative win rate (wins / total games played) */,
  "game" TEXT /* The game(s) in which the team competes */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* The year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of players in the team */,
  "team_leader" TEXT /* Name or ID of the team leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media metric record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team being measured */,
  "platform" TEXT /* The specific social media platform */,
  "twitter_compound_score" REAL /* Compound score derived from Twitter engagement */,
  "subscriber_count" INTEGER /* Number of subscribers on YouTube */,
  "youtube_compound_score" REAL /* Compound score derived from YouTube engagement */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total views across YouTube videos */,
  "follower_growth_rate" REAL /* Rate of growth in followers over a period */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Average engagement rate (likes, comments, shares) per post */,
  "post_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of posts (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_metrics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_history" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with the record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins on that date */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses on that date */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate on that date */,
  "game" TEXT /* The game in which the performance is recorded */,
  "region" TEXT /* The region in which the performance is recorded */,
  "tournaments" INTEGER /* Number of tournaments participated in */,
  "awards" INTEGER /* Number of awards or accolades received */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Current ranking in the league or tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the account holder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team manager, analyst, sponsor) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship agreement */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team being sponsored */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsoring company */,
  "sponsorship_amount" REAL /* Amount of money involved in the sponsorship */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship agreement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship agreement */,
  "sponsor_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the sponsor's logo */,
  "sponsor_website" TEXT /* URL to the sponsor's official website */,
  "sponsor_contact" TEXT /* Contact person at the sponsor's company */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the sponsorship agreement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., report_frequency) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who can modify the setting */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the setting was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
